title: Ways parents have influenced — trait-attribution map (2023)
html:
Ways parents have influenced — trait-attribution map (2023)

Source: 2023-07-30 Apple Note. Five-line attribution map — Yahir tagging which trait came from which parent.

TL;DR

  • From dad: caring for friends deeply, snacker, paying for women, not gifting someone a book you haven't read (specific, oddly tender rule).
  • From mom: making sure people are accommodated for.
  • The "paying for women" attribution is the most disclosing — Yahir explicitly inheriting his dad's traditional-masculine relational posture.
  • "Not gifting someone a book you haven't read" — strangely specific dad-rule that becomes a Yahir rule. Suggests dad as a reader who was particular about book-recommendations.
  • Asymmetry: dad gets 4 trait-credits, mom gets 1 — reflects whose presence dominated Yahir's mental model. Same asymmetry that the Maya note explains structurally ("mom was always a single respected unit because of dad").

Connections

  • dad wisdom
  • yahir family
  • mom house by the river
  • 2019 10 31 maya on where father went wrong
  • lineage as fate
  • debt of gratitude
